commands.review_summary:
The PR adds configured model choices to the shared `/model` native command registry and adjusts Discord and Telegram command handling/tests around model menu behavior.

PR surface: Source +108, Tests +382. Total +490 across 11 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug reproduction; this is a feature PR. Current main source shows `/model` has no choices/menu metadata, while PR head adds dynamic menu choices through the shared registry.
